flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Saint Mary's University of Minnesota rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($39.4k → $45.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Saint Mary's University of Minnesota rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($39.4k → $45.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Saint Mary's University of Minnesota fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2k → 1.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Saint Mary's University of Minnesota fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).
